content.rendered:
Top Travel Destinations for UK Holidaymakers in 2025

As we step into 2025, the travel bug is biting hard, and UK holidaymakers are already mapping out their next adventures. From sun-soaked beaches to bustling cities and serene mountain retreats, this year’s travel trends are shaping up to be excitingly diverse. So, where should you set your sights? Here’s our forecast for the most popular travel destinations in 2025, complete with handy links to buy the currency you’ll need for your trip. Let’s dive in!

1. Spain: The Timeless Favourite

Whether it’s the golden beaches of Costa del Sol, the vibrant streets of Barcelona, or the cultural charm of Seville, Spain remains a top choice for British holidaymakers. With year-round sunshine, short flights, and delicious tapas, it’s no wonder we keep going back for more.

Top Tip: Planning a beach getaway? Don’t forget to explore hidden gems like Almuñécar and Nerja for a quieter escape.

Buy Euros here.

2. United States: The Land of Endless Adventures

From the bright lights of New York City to the natural wonders of the Grand Canyon, the US offers something for everyone. In 2025, we’re predicting a rise in trips to Florida, with its family-friendly theme parks and sun-soaked beaches, as well as the ever-popular California road trips.

Travel Tip: Take advantage of favourable exchange rates by planning early!

Buy US Dollars here.

3. Thailand: The Exotic Escape

Thailand continues to captivate UK travellers with its stunning islands, rich culture, and incredible food. Whether you’re snorkelling in Koh Samui, exploring the bustling markets of Bangkok, or relaxing on the tranquil beaches of Krabi, Thailand offers unbeatable value for money.

Did You Know? January to April is the best time to visit for warm weather and fewer crowds.

Buy Thai Baht here.

4. Turkey: The Rising Star

Turkey’s blend of history, culture, and breathtaking landscapes makes it a hot ticket for 2025. From the ancient ruins of Ephesus to the fairy-tale-like Cappadocia, and of course, the turquoise waters of the Mediterranean coast, there’s so much to explore.

Pro Tip: Don’t leave without trying a traditional Turkish hammam for the ultimate relaxation.

Buy Turkish Lira here.

5. Japan: Where Tradition Meets Modernity

With the Rugby World Cup drawing crowds in 2025, Japan is gearing up for a big year. From the neon-lit streets of Tokyo to the serene temples of Kyoto and the stunning cherry blossoms in spring, Japan is a dream destination for culture lovers.

Must-Try Experience: Catch a sumo match or visit a traditional onsen for an unforgettable cultural immersion.

Buy Japanese Yen here.

6. Australia: The Bucket List Adventure

Australia’s diverse landscapes, from the Great Barrier Reef to the rugged Outback and cosmopolitan cities like Sydney and Melbourne, continue to draw British travellers. It’s the ultimate long-haul destination for those seeking adventure and natural beauty.

Travel Tip: Consider visiting during the UK winter to soak up the Aussie summer sunshine.

Buy Australian Dollars here.

7. Greece: The Romantic Getaway

Greece’s idyllic islands, crystal-clear waters, and rich mythology make it a perennial favourite for honeymooners and history buffs alike. Santorini, Crete, and Rhodes are set to remain popular picks for 2025.

Don’t Miss: A sunset dinner overlooking the caldera in Santorini – pure magic!

Buy Euros here.

8. Iceland: The Land of Fire and Ice

Iceland is becoming a go-to for those looking to experience the Northern Lights, natural hot springs, and dramatic volcanic landscapes. With direct flights from the UK and plenty of guided tours, it’s easier than ever to explore this unique destination.

Fun Fact: Summer in Iceland offers nearly 24 hours of daylight, perfect for exploring.

Buy Icelandic Krona here.

Ready to Pack Your Bags?

Wherever 2025 takes you, Travel FX is here to help you get the best rates on your travel money. Make sure to plan ahead, compare rates, and secure your currency before you go. Click on the links above to buy your travel money today and start the year off with savings in your pocket!

Here’s to making 2025 your most memorable travel year yet!

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
